approval_items.title: Add wall-clock max_hold_minutes: 120 to exits config
approval_items.rationale: time_stop_bars fails on bot restart. Wall-clock check using entry_time from state.json survives restarts.
approval_items.risk_if_not_applied: Another 905-minute runaway trade possible on every overnight entry

approval_items.title: Add circuit_breaker block with single_trade_max_loss_usd: 25
approval_items.rationale: No dollar-loss hard stop exists in deployed config. -$64.90 loss = 47% of session equity.
approval_items.risk_if_not_applied: Single trade can exceed any reasonable loss threshold with no automated stop

approval_items.title: Re-enable EV gate at min_ev_usd: -1.50
approval_items.rationale: Most entries have ev_usd between -1.2 and -3.2. Disabling EV gate allows fee-guaranteed losers.
approval_items.risk_if_not_applied: Continued negative-EV entry accumulation erodes account even with good win rate

approval_items.title: Set overnight_trading.mode to never (temporary)
approval_items.rationale: Both catastrophic losses started as overnight entries. Disable until wall-clock time stop is confirmed working.
approval_items.risk_if_not_applied: Overnight entries can hold for 16 hours with no intraday cutoff enforcement

approval_items.title: Reduce max_trades_per_day to 4 during loss-debt recovery period
approval_items.rationale: Reduces revenge-trading cascade risk while loss_debt > $30.
approval_items.expiry: Review after 7 days or when loss_debt < $20

safety_statement: This agent never executes trades and never modifies config files directly. All recommendations require human review and manual application.
